news.title: Nvidia Built Robots That Train Themselves Using AI Coding Agents
news.summary: Nvidia's ENPIRE hands an entire robot fleet to coding agents like Codex and Claude Code, letting them write training code, test it on real hardware, and improve without a human watching.

news.title: CoinFund, Coinbase Back Stablecoin Payments Startup Trace Finance in $32 Million Raise
news.summary: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance said Wednesday that it raised a $32 million Series A round to help expand its reach.

news.title: Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff with June primaries looming
news.summary: Several more US states are scheduled to hold primaries next week after one Republican candidate won in Alabama on Tuesday after a crypto company-backed PAC used what it called its “biggest spend of the cycle.”

news.title: Bitcoin capitulation ‘twice as weak’ after spot liquidity turns supportive: Glassnode
news.summary: Bitcoin’s realized losses fell by 46% as increasing bid-side liquidity points to easing sell pressure. Can bulls push BTC price back above $70,000?

news.title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
news.summary: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

news.title: Blockchain.com deepens onchain stock offerings as tokenized equities market grows
news.summary: The rollout in collaboration with Ondo Finance broadens access to tokenized traditional assets as demand for onchain stocks and ETFs continues to grow.

news.title: Altcoin selling tops $266B as capital rotates out of crypto: Is altseason extinct?
news.summary: Altcoin spot demand fell to its weakest level in six years while the stablecoin market cap, stocks and AI industry continued to capture investors’ attention.

news.title: 伊朗外交部发言人：美必须在30天内结束海上封锁
news.summary:
【伊朗外交部发言人：美必须在30天内结束海上封锁】金色财经报道，6月18日，伊朗外交部发言人巴加埃表示，如果以色列继续占领黎巴嫩，将被视为违反谅解备忘录，伊方将采取必要措施。巴加埃说，美伊双方已达成一致，将在未来60天内就最终协议展开谈判。美国必须在30天内结束海上封锁。巴加埃表示，关于霍尔木兹海峡，已商定在特定期限内使海上交通恢复正常。这是伊朗自身的职责，将完全由伊朗负责执行，不需要其他方面的参与或干预。在制定霍尔木兹海峡管理机制方面，伊朗将与阿曼开展合作。在有需要的情况下，也会与本地区其他国家交换意见。 (央视新闻)

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2402943

news.title: 伊朗外交部称伊方前往瑞士会谈的计划未变
news.summary:
【伊朗外交部称伊方前往瑞士会谈的计划未变】金色财经报道，6月18日，伊朗外交部发言人巴加埃表示，截至目前，伊朗前往瑞士会谈的计划没有变化。关于谅解备忘录的签署方式，其中一个设想是由伊朗和美国两国总统出面签署，目前该方案仍在审议之中。瑞士外交部此前表示，美伊谅解备忘录的签署仪式将于19日在瑞士比尔根山度假村举行。有消息称，美国副总统万斯和伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫预计将出席签字仪式。当地时间6月17日，美国总统特朗普表示，美伊谅解备忘录很可能在近期签署，“可能是18日，也可能是19日”。在被问及为何不出席可能举行的签署仪式时，特朗普表示，自己“也许会去”， 但同时称，“这是一份谅解备忘录，非常重要，但它可能不是那种需要由我亲自签署的文件。” (央视新闻)

原文链接: https://www.cls.cn/detail/2402942

news.title: I have only 6 months of emergency funds in fiat. Should I go all in btc?
news.summary:
As the title says I have just 6X my monthly expenses in the bank in savings accounts.

​

Should I go how many months of money into bitcoin? 1x? 2x? 4x?
